description: Launch of Penta Group brand - Hamilton Place Strategies and five other firms combine into one data-driven stakeholder solutions firm with Matt McDonald as president.
Excellera Advisory Group is founded through a merger of leading Italian corporate affairs firms (Cattaneo Zanetto & Co., Community) with backing from Xenon Private Equity.
Penta forms an AI Data & Innovation team to begin integrating generative AI across its operations.
Vision 2023 – CEO & Investor Outlook Survey reports that 48% of CEOs have adopted AI and 58% plan further AI investment, noting AI as a strong alignment point between CEOs and investors.
Matt Groch promoted to Global Managing Director of TRUE Global Intelligence (FH's analytics arm), signaling FH's intent to expand data/AI-driven services at the highest level.
McKinsey acquires Iguazio, a Tel Aviv-based MLOps platform company, adding its technology and 70+ AI specialists to QuantumBlack to accelerate and scale AI deployments for clients.
James Temple joins Accenture Song as Global Metaverse Lead, signaling Song's focus on emerging tech integration.
FGS Global's Digital Insights newsletter highlights generative AI's emergence, noting Microsoft's integration of ChatGPT and China's crackdown on deepfakes.

APCO acquires Gagen MacDonald, a Chicago-based transformation and employee engagement consultancy, to deepen its capabilities in guiding organizational change and managing the human side of change spurred by AI and digital disruption.
FTI's TMT practice publishes a News Bytes tech newsletter discussing Google's release of Bard and declaring "the age of AI begins."
Weber Shandwick Futures launches a generative AI-powered "Narrative Intelligence" platform to help visualize and inform comms strategy in the context of market narratives.
BerlinRosen & Glen Echo launch European office in Amsterdam, expanding tech policy communications to EU market in preparation for AI regulatory communications needs.
PR News publishes an article by an Edelman leader on managing brand reputation amid AI-driven misinformation, highlighting concerns about generative AI and advising companies on maintaining trust.
Excellera announces the addition of Barabino & Partners (Italy's largest financial communications firm) to the group, achieving €60M+ revenue and ~300 staff.
Edelman.com features 'Top 9 Applications of Generative AI for Marketers That You Can Adopt Tomorrow' by Justin Westcott, listing practical use cases of generative AI in marketing and communications.
Penta Partner Andrea Christianson publishes 'Five Essential Considerations for Communication Pros' on adopting GenAI.
Accenture announces a $3 Billion investment in AI over three years and plans to double its AI talent to 80,000 people, launching a new Data & AI practice strategy.
Edelman publishes 'We've Been Here Before: How Social Media Prepared Business Leaders for The AI Revolution,' drawing parallels between social media disruption and the emerging AI revolution.
VentureBeat runs an op-ed titled 'How ChatGPT and Generative AI Could Bring the Star Trek Holodeck to Life,' exploring imaginative long-term possibilities of generative AI.
McKinsey announces a collaboration with Cohere to bring enterprise-grade generative AI to clients, leveraging Cohere's large language models and platform for private, secure AI applications.

BCW (now Burson) enters exclusive partnership with Limbik (AI firm) and launches 'BCW Decipher' – a cognitive AI platform to predict and neutralize harmful narratives by assessing message credibility and viral potential.
Jim O'Leary (NA CEO) publishes a Fast Company op-ed with colleague Will Crain on the need for CEOs to balance AI capabilities with authenticity in their communications.
Corey duBrowa announced as Global CEO of BCW, joining from Google with a mandate to accelerate innovation and an 'AI-first' vision for the firm.
McKinsey publishes a case study on partnering with Google Cloud to use generative AI in Formula E racing, helping an electric race car set a world record for indoor land speed.
Penta establishes an internal AI Task Force led by Andrea Christianson to pilot AI use cases and develop internal AI usage policies.
FGS releases Insight to Impact Podcast Episode 5, 'Decoding the impact of AI on communications,' featuring FGS Partner Theo Hildebrand and WPP's AI head discussing AI use-cases and risks in PR.
Accenture (Accenture Ventures) invests in Writer, an enterprise generative AI content platform.
FGS Global publishes its Q3 2023 Business Policy Survey report finding that 57% of employees and decision-makers have used generative AI at work, but only 49% report having AI usage guidelines.
Oxford University Innovation publishes 'Words to create impact' case study on the Kekst-Oxford project, describing the new communication pattern measurement system.
Weber Shandwick hosts an "AI Deciphered" panel in New York in partnership with PRWeek/Campaign.
David Droga (CEO of Song) interview published discussing Gen AI's impact, asserting generative AI won't devour jobs but the people who can operate it will.

Hill+Knowlton (now Burson) launches 'H+K Sonar', an AI-powered analytics tool to detect, predict, and mitigate online harmful narratives as part of a new global Intelligence & Technology unit with 50+ specialists.
Accenture launches LLM Switchboard, an internal service allowing clients and teams to test and dynamically route queries to different large language models for best results.
FTI's StratComm team launches 'News Bytes' newsletter (Telecom, Media & Tech edition) featuring AI developments.

APCO Worldwide launches 'Adaptive Intelligence' initiative, introducing 'Margy' – an AI-powered virtual team member – and a new AI Advisory offering for clients to help with responsible AI governance, crisis plans, policy advocacy, and AI education.
PRWeek publishes 'Meet Margy, APCO's AI-powered team member,' highlighting APCO's AI initiative and revealing an internal AI Steering Committee led by Evan Kraus.
Communicate (Middle East) and other regional outlets report on the Margy launch, with APCO President Evan Kraus emphasizing that AI is an opportunity to harness the collective wisdom of APCO.
Arab News publishes 'Meet Margy: APCO's new AI-powered team member helping firms navigate transformation,' bringing APCO's AI news to a Middle East audience.
FTI Strat Comms hosts a breakfast panel in London on the outcomes of the UK's first AI Safety Summit, featuring "leading women in the AI field."
BCW unveils the 'Decipher Index,' a public AI-driven platform that predicts weekly top trending themes regionally and globally, offered free via DecipherIndex.com.
Article 'The World of AI in 2024' discusses emerging AI trends for 2024, framing a futuristic scenario of daily life with AI and advising businesses on preparedness.
Weber Shandwick introduces its "AI Accelerator" offering to enable communicators and marketers to adopt generative AI.

FGS hosts 'Managing Reputation in the Age of AI' panel in London on the one-year anniversary of ChatGPT, with experts from Clifford Chance, McKinsey, and IBM discussing AI regulation, geopolitical tensions, and deepfakes.
Brunswick Review Issue 5 includes early AI discussions such as 'AI and the Board' article.
Weber Shandwick officially announces the AI Accelerator via company news release.
Fergus AI platform rolled out internally to FGS's consultants globally, serving as an AI research and knowledge assistant to help synthesize information and draft content in a secure environment.
Glen Echo publishes blog 'The Business of AI: Transforming Data' reviewing 2023 AI trends including GenAI rise and enterprise AI adoption, emphasizing AI as integral to business.
'What to Watch in 2024' – Geopolitical Risk Outlook notes technological disruption as a key theme, including AI as part of accelerating technological disruption that CEOs must navigate.
FTI's IR Monitor newsletter (EMEA) spotlights "The buy-side view on AI" from an IR Magazine forum, emphasizing that AI is ubiquitous in investment analysis but human engagement remains irreplaceable.
Brunswick begins increasing commentary on AI as ChatGPT hype grows.
Kekst CNC begins collaboration with Oxford University linguists to develop an AI-powered Executive Impact Score system for analyzing spoken communications.
FTI Technology publishes the 2023 Privacy and AI Governance Report, exploring companies' AI governance practices and overlap with privacy programs.

APCO establishes a formal AI Steering Committee to oversee all AI initiatives and policy, meeting regularly to set AI usage guidelines, security controls, and strategic priorities for Margy and related tools.
WPP announces merger of BCW and Hill+Knowlton to form 'Burson,' effective July 1, 2024, creating a tech-enabled communications powerhouse with an AI-first innovation pipeline.
FTI publishes 'Bridging the Gap Between AI Implementation, Governance and Democracy: An Operational and Regulatory Perspective' article predicting the evolution of the AI landscape in 2024.
McKinsey highlights a project with ING where QuantumBlack helped the bank build a custom generative AI chatbot for customer service.

Teneo Vision 2024 – CEO & Investor Survey Release highlights a 20-point jump in CEOs investing in AI (78% in 2024 vs 58% prior year) and details CEOs' concerns versus investors' expectations in AI adoption.
FTI releases "Responsible AI Governance: Future Proofing Corporate Governance, Strategy, Risk Management and Reporting," a report urging boards to adopt AI governance frameworks.
Accenture Song acquires Mindcurv, a Germany-based cloud-native company.

PRWeek publishes 'Progress Report: How agencies are using AI right now' featuring Brian Buchwald outlining Edelman's approach to helping clients integrate generative AI and using 30+ AI platforms internally.
Axios publishes 'Public trust in AI is sinking,' referencing an exclusive Edelman Trust Barometer Flash Poll showing 49% of U.S. respondents reject growing AI adoption.
At SXSW 2024, Jim O'Leary represents Weber Shandwick in an Axios-hosted panel on communicators' role in the age of AI.
FTI Consulting and Relativity release the General Counsel Report 2025, revealing that 44% of GCs are now using AI (up from 20% in 2023).
Penta features heavily in an Axios piece 'PR firms race to launch internal AI tools,' highlighting the firm's role in the PR sector's AI adoption wave.
McKinsey and Google Cloud announce a partnership to help companies harness generative AI potential, combining McKinsey's industry expertise with Google's AI/ML services like Vertex AI.
Edelman promotes Brian Buchwald to Global Chair of Artificial Intelligence and Product to spearhead further AI investment.

BerlinRosen Holdings rebrands as Orchestra, uniting eight agencies under one brand and positioning itself as a data-driven, multi-specialty communications firm adapting to AI and data analytics tools.
Axios reports on PR firms racing to launch internal AI tools for trend monitoring and message testing, setting industry backdrop for Orchestra's own AI tool adoption.
Joyce Higgins joins FH (London) as Head of AI Strategy to lead AI transformation across the agency.

Burson names its global innovation & tech leadership team: Chad Latz as Global Chief Innovation Officer, Grant Toups as Global Chief Digital & Intelligence Officer, and Chris Kief as Global Chief Technology Officer.
"Harnessing the Benefits of AI While Managing Operational and Reputational Risks," an article by Charles Palmer (Global TMT lead), is published advising companies on crafting AI narratives.
FTI StratComm publishes 'Harnessing the Benefits of AI While Managing Operational and Reputational Risks' by Senior MD Charles Palmer.
McKinsey forms a strategic partnership with NVIDIA to empower enterprises to adopt generative AI and AI-enabled workflows using NVIDIA's AI computing platforms and software.
Kekst formally unveils its AI-driven Executive Impact Score tool after a year+ of development with Oxford experts.
FTI showcases a case study demonstrating their turnaround of a NASDAQ-listed data and AI services firm post-acquisition, achieving 35% SG&A cost reduction and doubling EBITDA.
McKinsey publishes 'Accelerating generative AI value creation with Iguazio' reporting the integration of Iguazio into QuantumBlack and launch of QuantumBlack Horizon AI development suite.

Havas (parent of H/Advisors) unveils a €400 million, 4-year investment plan in data, technology, and AI, announcing development of a new integrated operating system modeled on its "Converged" AI platform.
FTI Consulting (firm-wide) launches a cross-segment Digital & AI offering with 1,100 professionals aligned across 9 areas including Artificial Intelligence and Communications & Insights.
QuantumBlack Labs unveils 20+ industry AI products with 140+ use-case accelerators, including OptimusAI, LifeSciences.AI, Insurance AI, and Retail AI, marking a shift toward productized offerings.

APCO publishes blog 'Opportunities and Challenges of AI in the Communications Industry: APCO's Approach' by Imad Lahad, revealing the AI Comms Lab launch in 2018 and the existence of 60+ AI advocates globally.

Campaign Middle East runs op-ed 'Keeping up with AI: We need to move fast' by APCO's Imad Lahad, discussing how AI brings communications to an inflection point and emphasizing urgent but responsible adoption.
Weber Shandwick EMEA publishes "AI: transforming communications and brand trust." authored by Barnaby Fry.
Henry Timms assumes CEO role at Brunswick Group with a mandate to innovate and broaden expertise.
Brunswick hires Christine Schirmer as a Partner in San Francisco joining the Tech, Media & Telecom practice.
Excellera affiliate Community reorganizes leadership (new CEO Roberto Patriarca, founder Auro Palomba becomes Vice Chair) to prepare for upcoming national and international challenges.
Burson launches 'Decipher Health,' a cognitive AI solution to optimize healthcare communications by analyzing disease-specific content for credibility/engagement and predicting message resonance.
Orchestra acquires Civitas Public Affairs Group, adding social impact and policy expertise to enhance ability to counsel on AI ethics and policy communications.
Excellera acquires Intwig, a 11-person data intelligence and AI firm founded by Aldo Cristadoro, bringing big data analytics and AI capabilities in-house.
Press coverage in Italian media on Intwig deal: Excellera integrates new AI and innovation competences to enhance reputation management and public affairs services.
FTI announces the hire of Brian Salsberg (former EY Global M&A leader) as Senior Managing Director, Global Head of M&A within its Transactions practice.
FTI Technology launches 'IQ📈.AI by FTI Technology' – a suite of AI-powered solutions for legal, regulatory and investigative applications.
Teneo announces strategic partnership with Aily Labs to integrate AI-driven decision intelligence into Teneo's services, featuring 300+ predictive models for real-time insights.
Weber Shandwick's website features "Beyond tactical applications: Exploring AI's role in creativity and strategy," summarizing insights from the AI Deciphered panel.
Orchestra acquires Small Girls PR, strengthening creative and earned media capabilities including experiential and influencer marketing for AI communications campaigns.
In partnership with the Arthur W. Page Society, FTI Strat Comms co-hosts a panel event in London on "Leveraging Generative AI for Communications in Regulated Industries."
Penta releases a survey report on AI in the workplace, finding an 'enthusiasm gap' between senior executives and junior staff regarding AI adoption.

Message Lab publishes 'How we use AI in content marketing' internal guide explaining Orchestra's use of ChatGPT for idea generation, simplifying complex information, and drafting short copy while emphasizing human oversight.
FTI (with Trinity College Dublin) publishes "Decoding AI Disclosure" (Europe edition) examining how STOXX Europe 50 companies disclose AI information.
Fast Company names The Weber Shandwick Collective to its "Most Innovative Companies 2024" list, with Weber's advances in data/AI cited as a factor.

"Conversazioni sull'Intelligenza Artificiale, il futuro è oggi" – A Winter Convention by Community (Excellera partner firm) features Aldo Cristadoro as a speaker discussing new frontiers of Generative AI and its impact.

Axios hosts 'Reimagining Corporate Communications' event in NYC sponsored by Burson, where Burson leaders discuss adapting strategies in a shifting media landscape including AI and stakeholder activism.
Co-founder Joele Frank appeared on The M&A Advisor's podcast discussing leveraging digital tools and social media to boost stakeholder engagement and thriving amid industry innovation.
Brunswick initiates a formal 'AI Lab' program and interviews candidates for Head of AI Labs.
APCO begins hiring data science and engineering talent to expand its AI capabilities, including posting for a Senior Data Science Manager, AI & Intelligence position in the U.S.

Intwig team integration and AI development phase: In the months following the acquisition (Sep-Dec 2024), Cristadoro's data science team collaborates with Excellera consultants to develop the new Excellera Intelligence platform and services.
Brunswick's 7th Annual Trends Forecast (Trends 2025) is released highlighting AI as a key theme.
Weber Shandwick launches Weber I/O in EMEA, a new capability focused on data, technology, and AI-driven innovation in communications.
Eric Kaplan, head of the firm's creative and design team, was promoted to Partner.
Brunswick onboards its Head of AI Labs to coordinate AI projects.
Sean Evins, former Meta and Twitter policy lead, joins as Partner in London to strengthen the firm's AI, emerging tech, and digital transformation advisory capabilities.
Sparky Zivin publishes 'Vision 2025: Everything is About to Change with AI in 2025' highlighting that 99% of CEOs now investing in AI and over half of large enterprises' AI projects showing ROI.
Brunswick posts job opening for AI Engineer in London to develop LLM-based applications.
Brunswick Review publishes 'An AI-First World' interview with Euro Beinat of Prosus.
Brunswick Review publishes 'The Rise of the Chief AI Officer' exploring growing demand for this C-suite role.

Inkhouse (Orchestra) named agency of record for six AI companies in Q1 2025 including Anaconda, Blaize, Forter, GetReal Security, Pigment, and Poolside, significantly expanding Orchestra's AI client roster.
Brunswick formally integrates AI into its service offerings catalog including Digital & AI capabilities.

FH publishes 'From Chaos to Clarity: Why AI is the Communications Industry's Strategic Imperative' (by Matt Groch & Caitlin Teahan) – an article articulating FH's view that AI is revolutionizing comms and agencies must adapt or fall behind.
Joele Frank published mid-year insight "Reading the Room: The 2025 Landscape So Far" noting AI, trade tariffs, and climate as key themes from the Milken Global Conference.
Launch of 'SAGE' Virtual Audience Platform: FH announces Sage – an AI-powered synthetic audience tool and dedicated team to help clients test campaigns with lifelike audience models.
Managing Director Lucas Pers moderated NIRI Annual Conference panel "Podcasts, Posts, Tweets and More" focusing on digital communications, AI, and evolving social landscape in investor engagement.

Burson unveils 'Reputation Capital,' an AI-powered tech+consulting offering that connects 8 drivers of reputation to business outcomes and provides an almost real-time reputation score with predictive scenario analysis.

H/Advisors Public Affairs publishes "Redefining Sovereignty in a Digital Age", an insights piece examining EU digital geopolitics and discussing the EU's dependency on cloud infrastructure and implications for AI, data mobility and cybersecurity.
JF published "IR's New Rules: Digital, Direct and Differentiated" featuring section "AI Behind the Curtain" advising that Generative AI is becoming a reliable supplemental tool for IR teams.
Introduction of FH Fusion (Data and AI-Powered Solutions Suite): FH rolls out Fusion to 'close the innovation gap' – a firm-wide AI innovation framework built on Omnicom's Omni platform.

Jed Repko, Lisa Boyd, and Natalia Weaver spoke on Faegre Drinker panel about "Investor Communications During Turbulent Times," advising to consider using AI preemptively to preview stakeholder reactions.
H/Advisors and Havas Red form a joint venture in Singapore, combining H/Advisors Klareco (corp comms) with Havas Red (consumer PR, social, experiential) into a single operation.

McKinsey releases a story on its internal McKinsey Value Intelligence (MVI) Assistant, a gen AI tool built on Google Cloud's Gemini model that provides consultants with instant insights on 50,000+ companies.
Shamrock Capital acquires Penta Group in a private equity deal aimed at accelerating growth and building out Penta's analytics and AI capabilities.
PR Week (UK) publishes "Our AI Plan: H/Advisors Maitland", a Q&A with Anna Fishlock (Head of Data & Digital) on how H/Advisors is staying ahead of the AI revolution.
Brunswick Review publishes 'A Road Map for AI' interview with Simon Greenman about AI opportunities and risks.
Brunswick releases 'AI Impact' Issue 6 of Brunswick Review devoted entirely to AI in business.
'A Look at Our Most Powerful AI Ingredient: People' – Ephraim Cohen publishes a flagship article outlining FH's philosophy of empowering people with AI rather than chasing tech fads.
E.J. Kim appointed Global Managing Director of TRUE Global Intelligence (FH's research & analytics consultancy).
Aaron Kwittken joins FGS Global as Partner & Global Head of Intelligence & Engagement to unify FGS's digital, data analytics, and AI initiatives.
McKinsey publishes a podcast episode 'How to lead through the AI disruption' featuring a discussion on fast AI innovation and how organizations can capture value in the era of democratized AI.
FH releases '5 AI Risks Every Company Should Be Aware Of' (by Zack Kavanaugh) highlighting communication pitfalls in AI adoption.
Kekst CNC posts on LinkedIn highlighting 'Turning AI into a Strategic Advantage' and addressing client concerns about getting ahead with AI.
Penta's senior team ramps up public discussion on AI with LinkedIn posts and What's at Stake podcast episodes on AI's impact on media.
Kekst CNC launches 'Above the Noise' video series with Episode 1 'How AI Is Reshaping Corporate Communication: GEO, Trust and Strategy.'

FH publishes 'Augmented Judgment, Accelerated Execution: AI's Role in Crisis, Issues and Risk Management' detailing how FH is using AI in crisis communication and sharing guidelines for AI in crisis practice.
Partner Barrett Golden spoke on panel at 13D Monitor Active-Passive Investor Summit about staying ahead of shareholder activism.
FGS participates in industry dialogue at PRovoke Global Summit 2025 in Chicago, where AI in PR is a major theme including discussions on crisis communications with AI agents.
Penta publishes 'The New Search Reality: How AI Decides What People Learn About You' research report analyzing 10,000 AI chatbot responses and introducing Generative Engine Optimization concept.
Penta officially launches its AI Practice offering three pillars of services: AI Advisory & Governance, AI + Reputation Management, and Agentic AI Execution.
FGS advertises a new senior role for Head of AI Advisory to lead its forthcoming AI client practice and integrate AI, data & analytics into client operations.
Kekst CNC likely continues the Above the Noise series with further installments on navigating the GenAI shift.
During WEF Davos 2026, H/Advisors actively participates in discussions on global business with AI as a key theme and circulates a "Leadership perspectives for 2026" global study.
Havas debuts "AVA" (Accessible Virtual Advisor) at CES 2026 as a secure, centralized AI platform for all its agencies.
Joele Frank published 2025 Year in Review, summarizing it as a milestone year with record project volume amid growing complexity.
Havas announces the acquisition of Acento Public Affairs (Spain) and integration of Acento into H/Advisors.
